arts.ttl: Essential Football pod: Man City vs Chelsea - the big preview
arts.sum: Ron Walker and Pete Smith preview the Saturday Night Football clash between Manchester City and Chelsea in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Report: Graham Potter has just said no to helping Enzo Maresca and taking £39m Chelsea player on loan
arts.sum: Chelsea are still looking to part ways with a number of first team stars in January in an attempt to freshen up the squad for...

arts.ttl: Man Utd face wonderkid HUMILIATION as Arsenal, Man City eye deal
arts.sum: Manchester United are at risk of missing out on long-standing target Sverre Nypan, according to David Ornstein, Fabrizio Romano and Norwegian media. According to Norwegian outlet Adresseavisen and since confirmed by Fabrizio Romano, Nypan is expected to arrive in Manchester shortly to tour the facilities of Man City and to hold talks over a transfer.

arts.ttl: Arsenal face wait over Chelsea decision as Manchester United fixture moved
arts.sum: Confirmation of time and date for Chelsea match will come after Arsenal’s Carabao Cup clash against Newcastle

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Chelsea and Man United among teams actively discussing signing winger compared to Eden Hazard
arts.sum: Lyon winger Rayan Cherki is being touted about for a move before the end of the transfer window and TBR Football can exclusively reveal that...

arts.ttl: Official Liverpool announcement speaks volumes as £203m FSG bonanza follows Man City complaint
Mikel Arteta confirms double Arsenal transfer call as Raheem Sterling loan future decided
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta reveals whether the Gunners could end Raheem Sterling's loan spell from Chelsea during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Transfer News Today: Garnacho CONFIDENCE, Nkunku TRUTH, Maresca CONFIRMS stance
arts.sum: FootballTransfers runs through all the latest Chelsea transfer news, rumours and gossip, including updates on Alejandro Garnacho, Christopher Nkunku and Enzo Maresca. Chelsea Transfer News Today: Garnacho CONFIDENCE, Nkunku TRUTH, Maresca CONFIRMS stance

arts.ttl: Pep: New signings will make Man City strong
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has said that Manchester City ’s three January signings will all be included in the squad to face Chelsea in a match he likened to a 'final'. In the space of less than a week, City signed defenders Abdukodir Khusanov and Vitor Reis from Lens and Palmeiras respectively, as well as forward Omar Marmoush from Eintracht Frankfurt.

arts.ttl: Why £130m is only the beginning to restore Man City to the top
arts.sum: "In the summer the club thought about it and I said 'no, I don't want to make any signings'," Pep Guardiola revealed before Manchester City travelled to Brentford last week.
